title: Re-peg governance ratchets for PR #140 artifact linkage restoration
intent: Update three CI baseline files to reflect PR #140's artifact linkage restoration: router count +2, file size thresholds for 2 files, and fence line number adjustments.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Three baseline files updated to match PR #140 merged state: (1) router_count_baseline.json route_decorators 1188->1190 for POST /api/saw/batch/toolpaths and POST /api/saw/batch/job-log; (2) file_size_baseline.json adds batch_router.py:550 and api_runs.py:503; (3) fence_baseline.json updates 4 RunArtifact line numbers in runs_v2/.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: PR #140 restored artifact linkage contract and expanded two files past the 500-line threshold. The baseline updates legitimize these already-merged changes.

commands_run: git show origin/main:services/api/app/rmos/runs_v2/*.py | grep -n RunArtifact (verified line numbers)

files.intent: Accept +2 routes from PR #140 batch_router.py additions
files.behavior_change: ci - restores ratchet enforcement with new baseline
verification: Route decorators verified: /toolpaths and /job-log added in PR #140

files.intent: Accept 2 files over 500-line threshold after PR #140
verification: Line counts verified via wc -l on origin/main

files.intent: Update 4 RunArtifact fence entries to new line numbers after PR #140 refactoring
files.behavior_change: ci - accepts moved symbols, no new policy violations
verification: All 4 line numbers verified via grep -n RunArtifact on origin/main

files.intent: Declare CI-RED-022 scope for CBSP21 review
